zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多
zh.content:
目前ETH/USD价格维持在2132.2附近，短期呈现轻微上行趋势。20日均线(SMA20)位于2118.374之下，表明价格仍在均线之上运行，短线多头力量略占优势，但市场波动幅度有限，整体趋势偏向震荡整理。

MACD当前为2.13325，显示多头动能存在，但缺乏信号线确认，表明上涨动力尚不够强烈。价格在2136一线附近存在明显阻力，而2129-2130区域提供近期支撑，短期区间波动可能在此上下徘徊，需关注突破情况以确认下一波行情。

从交易策略来看，建议短线交易者可考虑在支撑位附近布局多单，止损设置在2128以下，同时在阻力位附近减仓或获利了结。对于中线投资者，可继续持有但保持警惕，等待价格突破2140上方确认趋势延续。

综合来看，ETH/USD短期偏多震荡，动能尚未完全释放，支撑稳固但阻力明显。投资者应结合价格突破与均线支撑信号灵活调整仓位，避免追高或盲目抄底，以降低风险并把握潜在上涨机会。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum (ETH) is currently exhibiting a mild bullish bias, trading slightly above its 20-period simple moving average at 2118.37. The price has recently tested the intraday high of 2136.72 but shows limited upward momentum, suggesting consolidation near the 2130–2140 zone. The MACD reading of 2.13325, while positive, indicates a modest trend strength, implying buyers are present but not yet dominant. Short-term traders may look for confirmation above 2136 to signal a stronger bullish continuation.

Support levels for ETH/USD are anchored near the recent low of 2129.28 and the SMA20 at 2118. A break below these zones could expose further downside toward the 2100 psychological level. Conversely, resistance is evident around 2136–2140, with a higher target near 2150 if momentum accelerates. These zones will be critical in determining short-term directional bias and the balance between buyers and sellers.

Technical indicators suggest a cautiously optimistic outlook. While RSI data is unavailable, the positive MACD and price above SMA20 reflect underlying bullish sentiment. Traders may consider entering long positions on confirmed breakouts above resistance with tight stop-losses below 2129, while short positions could be justified only if support breaks convincingly. Market participants should monitor volume spikes and broader crypto market sentiment for validation.

In summary, ETH/USD is in a consolidation phase with a slight bullish inclination. Key levels to watch are 2118 and 2129 for support, and 2136–2140 for resistance. Breakouts in either direction will likely dictate near-term movement. Traders should adopt a disciplined risk approach, using these technical levels to guide entries and exits, while remaining aware of sudden volatility that can quickly shift momentum in the crypto market.
